title: Bitter Crispy Norwegian Beef Stir-fry
description: A romantic and crispy dish featuring beef stock concentrate to add a touch of bitterness, perfect for a light dinner.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add ground beef and cook until browned, stirring occasionally.
Add garlic paste and paprika powder to the pan and stir well for 1 minute.
Pour in beef stock concentrate and mix thoroughly. Bring to simmering point.
Reduce heat to low and let it cook for about 5 minutes or until slightly thickened.
Season with salt according to taste, ensuring all ingredients are evenly seasoned.
Serve hot as a side dish or garnish with fresh herbs.
